prerequisites.value: Cha 17, Lucid Dreamer, Practiced Dreamer, Knowledge (planes) 10 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** Your experience in the Dimension of Dreams allows you to enter the demiplane with ease. You no longer have to attempt a Charisma check when entering the Dimension of Dreams to determine whether or not you are at a disadvantage, instead automatically arriving unhindered.
